intro: Artemisia absinthium, also known as wormwood, has been used for centuries to create a balm with potential health benefits, including soothing skin irritations and reducing inflammation. The balm is typically made by infusing the plant's leaves and stems in a carrier oil, such as olive or coconut oil, to extract its medicinal properties. When applied topically, artemisia absinthium balm may help to calm and protect the skin, while also providing a natural and non-greasy barrier against the elements.
